trades.reasoning: Nuclear energy plays directly into AI data center power demand; perfect score 95 technical setup (RSI 70.0, MACD bullish crossover, price well above SMA-20) in a risk-on market with $477 cash to deploy.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on day with NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P +1.0% gives the green light for momentum positioning. Portfolio is running strong at +31.6% P&L with 4 slots open. Cash is just under $500 so deploying into SMR — a nuclear energy micro-cap riding the AI power demand narrative with a clean technical breakout. No existing positions are triggering stop-loss or profit-target alerts.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted broad gains today with growth and technology stocks leading the charge, as improving risk appetite drove money out of safe havens and into higher-beta names. AI infrastructure build-out optimism continues to be the dominant theme, lifting semiconductors (MRVL, INTC, MU all scoring 95) and energy names tied to data center power demand. The NASDAQ's outperformance over the S&P 500 confirms investors are in an offense-first posture heading into the summer.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面上漲，成長股與科技股領漲，投資者風險偏好回升，資金從避險資產流向高貝塔品種。人工智慧基礎建設持續擴張的樂觀情緒主導市場，帶動半導體（威爾半導體、英特爾、美光均獲滿分動能評級）及數據中心相關能源概念股走強。納指跑贏標普500印證市場整體處於積極進攻狀態，入夏以來多頭格局未見鬆動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on describes a market mood where investors feel confident enough to chase growth assets — tech, small caps, momentum stocks — rather than hiding in bonds or gold. Today's broad rally (NASDAQ +1.3%, S&P +1.0%) is a textbook risk-on session: aggressive positioning gets rewarded and stocks with strong technical momentum tend to extend their moves. Recognizing risk-on vs. risk-off helps you know when to press your winners and when to reduce exposure.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指市場情緒樂觀，投資者願意追逐科技股、小型股及動能股等高風險資產，而非躲入債券或黃金的市場狀態。今日大盤全面上漲——納指漲1.3%、標普漲1.0%——正是典型的風險偏好行情：積極多頭策略往往能獲豐厚回報，技術面強勁的動能股更易延續升勢。掌握風險偏好與風險規避的切換節奏，有助於判斷何時加碼、何時減倉。
